privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetic functional specification document (MediTrack Patient Management System v2.4 DRAFT from October 14, 2025) automatically generated by the setup_task.sh script using python-docx. Input file path is /home/ga/Documents/functional_spec_draft.docx and output must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/functional_spec_v2.docx. The document contains two intentional manual reference 'traps': (1) Static text 'Section 3.1 Patient Admission' in Section 1.2 that must be replaced with a dynamic Cross-Reference to the heading '3.1 Patient Admission', and (2) Static text 'compliance protocols found on page 8.' in Section 4.0 that must be replaced with a dynamic Page Reference to the heading '5. Compliance Standards'. Additionally, a 'File name' dynamic field must be inserted into the document header. The verifier checks for the presence of REF fields (cross-references), PAGEREF fields (page references), and FILENAME fields in the document XML structure.
